Etettere/1394/201 7/02] gore aarett, arrest freer areata arhersz (ez) fecquft : wer fra arar.fA. 570(a1) feats 17 Sears, 2012 are ART HUTT, HATA, AMT I, Gs 3, sTas (i) A warts feu we sy aa afeeaar Fea arawr.fAt. 898(a) feat 17 fearax, 2012, ee feate 10 Gers, 2015 ud arar.fa. 278(a) feath 26 Ara, 2018 are Sarita Te II MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (Railway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th December, 2018 G.S.R. 1205(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (1) read with clause (d) of Sub-section (2) of Section 87 of the Railways Act, 1989 (No. 24 of 1989), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railways (Punitive charges for overloading of wagon) Rules, 2012, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Railways (Punitive charges for overloading of wagon) Second Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Inthe Railways (Punitive charges for overloading of wagon) Rules, 2012, in the SCHEDULE,- (a) under the heading Situation-A,- (i) in Part-I, in the sub-heading, for the words “for wagons other than BCNHL and BCCW wagons”, the words “for wagons other than BCNHL, BCCW and BFNSM22.9 wagons” shall be substituted; (ii) in Part-II, in item (11), in the sub-heading, for the words “for BCCW wagons”, the words “for BCCW and BFNSM22.9 wagons” shall be substituted. (b) under the heading Situation-B,- (i) in Part-I, in the sub-heading, for the words “for wagons other than BCNHL and BCCW wagons”, the words “for wagons other than BCNHL, BCCW and BFNSM22.9 wagons” shall be substituted; (ii) in Part-II, in item (11), in the sub-heading, for the words “for BCCW wagons”, the words “for BCCW and BFNSM22.9 wagons” shall be substituted. [F. No. TCR/1394/2017/02] BARJESH DHARMANI, Executive Director, Traffic Commercial (Rates) Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i) vide number G.S.R. 570(E), dated the 17" July, 2012 and amended vide notification numbers G.S.R. 898(E), dated the 17" December, 2012 , G.S.R. 550(E), dated the 10" July, 2015 and G.S.R. 278(E), dated the 26"" March, 2018.
